audit_items.proof_trace: `s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp` is set at L353 unconditionally before `_onAuctionStart(asset)` at L354, the sole call site of that function. `GPV2CompatibleAuction._onAuctionStart` then calls `forceApprove(i_gpV2VaultRelayer, IERC20(asset).balanceOf(address(this)))` at L92, approving the full balance transferred in by `transferForSwap` earlier in the same transaction. Auction-end revokes the allowance via `forceApprove(relayer, 0)`, so no stale approval risk exists.
